sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64623" key="makre/teios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μακρ-έτειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔτος</etym>) <sense id="n64623.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">aged</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
